title: India's average temperature rose by 0.9 degrees C in last decade: study
author: PTI
long_desc: India's average temperature rose by nearly 0.9 degrees Celsius in the last decade (2015-2024) with the number of warm days increasing across most of the country, a new study says, highlighting the urgent need for adaptation strategies.The hottest day of the year also registered a temperature rise of 1.5-2 degrees Celsius in western and northeast India since the 1950s, the study found.The research by climate scientists Chirag Dhara (Krea University, India), Aditi Deshpande (Savitribai Phule Pune University), Roxy Mathew Koll (Indian Institute of Tropical Meteorology), Padmini Dalpadado (Institute of Marine Research, Norway) and Mandira Singh Shrestha (International Center for Integrated Mountain Development, Nepal), states that this warming is driving a surge in extreme weather events.The…

title: California floods: Southern region ravaged by storm — videos show widespread damage
author: TOI World Desk
long_desc: After soggy Christmas celebrations due to a winter storm in California, the southern region is now witnessing a powerful storm this week. The extreme weather has unleashed heavy rain, strong winds and snowfall.Multiple videos making rounds on social media show flooded roads, mudslides and debris-choked towns. While the storm was expected to ease by Friday, authorities warn of ongoing risks including flash floods, high surf and avalanches.126186921Among the worst hit regions was Wrightwood, a mountain town located about 128kms northeast of Los Angeles. Evacuation warnings were on place as residents were asked to prepare for necessary precautions to tackle the mudslide that swept through the area, turning roads into rivers of mud and rocks and knocking out power. It’s really a crazy…
